title: Guided Session Flow, MascotIdle, MoodCheck, CategorySelector, Idle Timeout

files_to_create.purpose: Custom hook: listens to window pointer/keyboard events, fires onIdle30 after 30s and onIdle60 after 60s of inactivity; disabled via enabled=false on home screen
Panda mascot component with inline SVG face, Framer Motion float (up-down loop) and blink (every 3s) animations, speech bubble, size/showBubble/onClick props
3-emoji mood selector (😊😐😴) with bilingual labels and Framer Motion tap animations; calls onMoodSelected(mood)
2-column grid of category tiles with emoji, EN/ZH labels, word count badge; All Categories tile at top-left; calls onSelect(category | 'all')
Step 0 of GuidedSession: MascotIdle size=lg, bilingual heading, auto-advance timer, Let's Go button; extracted to keep GuidedSession under 150 lines
4-step guided session flow (Greeting→MoodCheck→ExploreCards→Celebration) using AnimatePresence slide transitions; manages state, fetches unmastered words from DB, records session
Tests for idle timeout hook: enabled/disabled, timer callbacks at 30s/60s, cleanup on unmount, reset on events
Tests: renders with data-testid, float animation present, speech bubble shown/hidden, onClick fires
Tests: renders 3 mood buttons with correct data-testids, onMoodSelected called with correct mood value
Tests: renders all category tiles, All Categories tile present, onSelect called with correct category
Tests: renders greeting step initially, proceeds to mood check, mood selection advances to explore, celebrate step shown after explore complete

changes: Add MascotIdle in bottom-left corner (size='sm', showBubble, onClick clears bubble)
Add onPointerDown on root div to reset mascotBubble
In handleNext on last card: if onComplete provided, call it instead of setComplete(true) + saveSession
files_to_modify.note: Existing tests unaffected since they don't pass onComplete

steps.action: Implement MascotIdle component (SVG panda, float/blink animations, speech bubble)
Add onComplete prop to ExploreCards (minimal change)
Update ChildLayout with idle timeout + MascotIdle
Implement GuidedSession component (4-step flow, DB word selection, session recording)
Write tests for all new/modified components
Run npm test, fix any failures
Commit and push, write PR body

cases: cleans up listeners and timers on unmount
renders each category tile with emoji and labels
calls onSelect(category) when category tile tapped
clicking proceed advances to mood check
selecting a mood advances to explore step
onComplete from ExploreCards advances to celebration step

risk_areas.mitigation: Use repeatDelay + duration keyframe approach; blink mock in tests bypasses timing

risk_areas.area: fetchWords race condition (db not ready at mood selection)
risk_areas.mitigation: Show loading spinner for step 2 when words.length===0; await fetchWords before setStep(2)
Prop is optional; existing tests don't pass it; logic guarded by if(onComplete)

risk_areas.area: Window event listeners in SSR context
risk_areas.mitigation: useIdleTimeout only attaches listeners inside useEffect (client-side only)
MascotIdle fixed bottom-left (bottom-20 left-4), home button bottom-right; no overlap

persistence_strategy: All session data recorded via addSession() to IndexedDB (existing 'sessions' object store in 'littlebridge' DB). No new DB structures needed. Data survives page refresh.
error_handling_approach: fetchWords in GuidedSession wrapped in try/catch; if DB unavailable, shows empty words fallback state. saveSession errors are caught and logged (non-blocking). All DB calls use existing error patterns from codebase.
